74670.subject: 🚀 SpaceX flips Microsoft
74670.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $64,776 (-2.5%) | **ETH** $1,762 (-2.3%) | **SOL** $72 (-3.4%)

* Oil sinks [7%](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2066931775096447048) under $76 as US-Iran deal lets Tehran [resume sales](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2066914695274012857?s=20)

* Uniswap’s UNI token surges over 10% as Standard Chartered gives [$100 price target](https://x.com/DecryptMedia/status/2067205553269445009?s=20)

* Binance’s MiCA [license is in jeopardy](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2066884038791762199?s=20) and the exchange could lose permission to serve EU clients

* SpaceX briefly [flips Microsoft](https://x.com/zoomerfied/status/2066884086174458063?s=20) to become 4th largest public company by market cap

* US Government [intervenes with private lawsuit](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2066952984559497338?s=20) against XAI data centers

* SBF tells prison inmate that he will [launch a token](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2067063631012139258?s=20) when he gets out of jail

* Illinois Governor signs [aggressive crypto tax](https://x.com/crypto_council/status/2066993835977453873?s=20) bill into law

* Snapchat reveals new [AR glasses](https://x.com/tokens/status/2066949551332995549?s=20)

* Jeff Bezos believes AI will cause a [labor shortage](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2067182306763108522?s=20)

* Ripple backs Flutterwave at [$3.2B](https://www.theblock.co/post/404942/ripple-flutterwave-series-3-2-billion-valuation-rlusd-integration) to bring RLUSD to Africa

* India files charges in a [$20M](https://www.theblock.co/post/404872/india-files-charges-against-8-defendants-in-alleged-20-million-coinbase-spoofing-scam) fake-Coinbase phishing scheme — Bans [Telegram](https://x.com/Cointelegraph/status/2066923979474891005) for a week over leaked exam questions

* Coinbase to launch 1:1 backed [tokenized](https://x.com/Cointelegraph/status/2066903378756550941) US stocks next month — Base launches [compliant](https://x.com/base/status/2066972150586569117) private transactions for enterprises

* Tether partners with [Dubai](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2066867165471322466)'s DMCC on digital asset expansion

* Inveniam to acquire RWA chain MANTRA after last year's [$20M](https://www.theblock.co/post/4

Fear and Greed is at
23
(Fear)
and BTC is near
$65K
this morning. The Fed wraps its two-day meeting today, with a
rate decision arriving this afternoon. Markets are watching
closely.

While traders wait for the Fed, Wall Street is not pausing.
BlackRock just launched a Bitcoin yield ETF. State Street entered
the stablecoin reserves race. Coinbase opened stock transfers to
its platform. Ripple backed Africa's largest fintech. The
infrastructure layer keeps expanding regardless of where rates
land today.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Coinbase Just Became an Everything Exchange

Coinbase announced on June 16 that US users can now transfer
existing stock portfolios onto the platform without selling their
holdings. Once transferred, stocks sit alongside crypto in a
single account.

Zero-commission trading, fractional shares, and TradingView
charting tools are included in the offering.

What does Coinbase's head of financial services say customers
want from a single account?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/zzUKToemUSWNkjdHkpQHHQ~~/AAQRxRA~/ybw7VHj4dXzG7M9kKEvdUyT-stct_zUpjAFMmlJjpvQw6y0Pia_eweLhznzPQd5VZYW44Ekvo0LFwGL_duq3w1YMqNxiCX7FjpE2oynGGoWiuDnPq4b74zToDz78lXzXLyRDti7tcQdcvMRKqAnfG5ITqGJ8zibVUQTJmkt71Co~ )
   State Street Just Entered the Stablecoin Reserves Race

fund on June 16 specifically d
